title: Looted
description: A simple loot bag mod, easily configurable for modpack creators.
body:
![Looted Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eaea8cb85e8e49802b44e31f956e309bcc5f04c.png)

> [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/QDSYsQzrj2) to report bugs, suggest mods or features, or to simply chat.

Introduces loot bags into your world! They are easily configurable through a data pack, making it effortless for modpack creators to configure their own loot tables.

It is encouraged to configure your own loot drops when using this mod, however there are some included by default. The loot bags cannot be crafted: you must add recipes for them or add them to existing loot tables to make them obtainable through a data pack.

This mod is intended for modpack creators.

# 💰 Content
Here is a list of the drops available in the default loot tables.
### Common Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.
- Leather 1-3
- String 1-2
- Stick 1-4

### Uncommon Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.
- Raw Copper 1-3
- Iron Nugget 2-4
- Chain 1-2

### Rare Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.
- Iron Ingot 1-3
- Raw Gold 1-2
- Any Music Disc _(Excluding Pigstep, Relic & 5)_

### Epic Loot Bag
Maximum of 2 rolls.
- Diamond 1-2
- Emerald 1-4
- Dragon Breath
